title: Idle replay — sleep-consolidation analogue; pick random past episodes during user idle, look for cross-session patterns
depends_on: T-134 (uses salience to rank candidate episodes)
T-072 (mid-session distill is the closest existing analogue — pattern reuse)
T-084 (router with TPD-budget brownout to skip replay when budget low)
current_state: Pi consolidates only at session-end (on_exit step session_summary + retention_tick) and every 10 turns mid-session (_maybe_mid_session_distill). A fact mentioned twice across distinct sessions never gets connected because each session distills in isolation. Pi has no notion of replay, rehearsal, or background pattern detection.
structural_problem: Hippocampal replay during slow-wave sleep is what humans use to build cross-session abstractions. Pi has all the raw episodes (L1 raw_wiki) but consolidates them only into single-session L2 facts. Patterns spanning sessions are invisible.
target_state: agent/idle_replay.py exports IdleReplayManager class running a daemon thread. After 5 minutes of no user input, picks 3 random L1 episodes from the last 7 days, re-runs distill_session on each, dedups against existing L2. If 3+ episodes share an entity, spawns a meta-fact (category='pattern_observation', e.g. 'Ash mentions GNN 14 times across April-May'). Hard caps: 1 replay/hour, 10/day. Halts within 5s of user input. Skips when router TPD budget < 20%.
files_affected: pi_agent.py — instantiate manager in __init__; notify_activity() in process_input wrapper
memory/pipeline.py — distill_session already accepts rows= for subset; extend with mode='replay' to tag writes
scripts/passive/silent_failure_watcher.py — surface idle_replay category if it spikes
design_notes: Daemon thread polls every 5s checking (now - last_user_input) > 300s
Pick 3 random L1 episodes — weighted by salience (T-134 composite); high-salience episodes replayed more often
Distillation in replay mode uses tier='cheap' on the router (same as existing mid-session)
Cross-session pattern detection: SELECT entity, COUNT(*) FROM raw_wiki JOIN entity_extraction WHERE timestamp > now-7d GROUP BY entity HAVING count >= 3
Meta-fact format: 'Pattern detected: <entity> appears in <N> sessions over <date range>'
Replay writes tagged source='replay' in metadata; weekly_memory_audit can filter these out for quality review
Privacy (Inv. 4): in god mode, IdleReplayManager reads from god_memory.db ONLY; never cross-streams
TPD-budget guard: before each replay, call router.tpd_budget_remaining(); skip if < 20%
Pause flag (notify_activity): replay thread checks every loop iteration; user input sets flag, replay halts within 5s
success_criteria: 5 min idle → first replay fires (in test with mocked clock)
Pattern: entity in 4 distinct sessions over 7d → meta-fact written to L2 with category='pattern_observation', source='replay'
Replay never writes to public L2 from god mode (namespace isolation)
TPD budget < 20% → replay skipped, logged via track_silent
risk_notes: Highest cost-risk ticket in Tier 4. Mitigation: hard caps + TPD guard + env flag PI_IDLE_REPLAY=on (default OFF). Privacy risk: replay reading from raw_wiki across modes — Inv. 4 namespace check is mandatory. Quality risk: replay produces low-value meta-facts that pollute L2. Mitigation: source='replay' tag enables filtering + weekly_memory_audit review.
migration_plan: 1. Write agent/idle_replay.py with IdleReplayManager class — pure Python, no agent dependency.
2. Unit-test IdleReplayManager in isolation with mocked clock + mocked memory.
3. Integrate: pi_agent.py.__init__ instantiates manager (gated by PI_IDLE_REPLAY env flag).
5. Add pattern detection query — needs entity extraction (already cheap via _extract_entities).
6. Soak test: run with PI_IDLE_REPLAY=on for 1 week, monitor data/silent_failures.db + L2 growth rate.
7. After soak: flip default to on if pattern_observation writes look useful in weekly audit.
